extensionDescription.message: Korvaa uutissivujen klikkiotsikot vastaamaan paremmin juttujen sisältöä

siteTitleNotSupported.description: Message to show in 'main' title element when the visited site is not supported

siteTitleError.description: Message to show in 'main' title element when there was an unexpected error processing the site

statsErrorUserFixInstructions.message: Sivun tietoja ei saatu ladattua. Koeta päivittää ikkuna.
statsErrorUserFixInstructions.description: Instruction text to show in the bottom of 'main' view to help user with an unexpected error

statsviewHandledElementsTitle.description: Title of the stats section showing number of handled elements of site processing

statsviewChangedTitlesFillerText.description: Additional 'flair' text of the stats section showing number of changed titles on the site

statsviewShortcutControlsTitle.description: Title of the main view shortcut controls section

statsviewSiteEnabledShortcutButtonText.description: Text on the button in the main view that acts as a shortcut to disable/enable current site

feedbackviewGeneralFeedbackHeader.description: Title of the feedback view general feedback section

feedbackviewGeneralFeedbackLoading.description: Text marking that the embedded generic feedback form is still loading in to the document

feedbackviewRateTitleHeader.description: Title of the feedback view converted title rating section

feedbackviewRateTitleOriginalTitleLabel.description: Text marking the original title on the feedback view converted title rating section

feedbackviewRateTitleConvertedTitleLabel.description: Text marking the converted title on the feedback view converted title rating section

feedbackviewRateTitleConversionIsGood.description: Text on the button in the feedback view converted title rating that the user can rate the conversion as 'good'

feedbackviewRateTitleConversionIsBad.description: Text on the button in the feedback view converted title rating that the user can rate the conversion as 'bad'

settingsviewSitesEnabledTitle.description: Title of the settings view enabled sites section

settingsviewDevmodeTitle.description: Title of the settings view devmode section

navigationMainLabel.description: Label of the navigation menu main view button

navigationMainIconAlt.description: Alt text of the navigation menu main view button icon

navigationFeedbackLabel.description: Label of the navigation menu feedback view button

navigationFeedbackIconAlt.description: Alt text of the navigation menu feedback view button icon

navigationSettingsLabel.description: Label of the navigation menu settings view button

navigationSettingsIconAlt.description: Alt text of the navigation menu settings view button icon

devmodeHiddenButtonTitle.description: Title-attribute of the hidden devmode activation button
